reload_policies.live_reload: Safe to change with Reload Config while PX4 is disconnected or connected. Do not change during an armed flight unless diagnosing.
reload_policies.reconnect_before_flight: Change before connecting PX4 SITL, or disconnect/reconnect before flying. Reload may parse it, but in-flight changes are not supported.
reload_policies.px4_sitl_restart: Requires changing PX4 airframe parameters or restarting PX4 SITL; not a px4xplane config.ini live setting.
reload_policies.development_only: For controlled debugging only. Keep disabled for normal releases and demo flights.

config_name.description: Name of the active airframe section in this config file.

debug_log_sensor_values.description: Log high-volume sensor values and noise diagnostics.

debug_accel_bypass_calibration.description: Bypass accelerometer calibration for controlled debugging.

diagnostic_log_enabled.description: Emit compact bridge health lines to X-Plane Log.txt.

diagnostic_log_interval_s.description: Seconds between compact bridge health log lines.

show_connection_status_hud.description: Show the compact connection/status HUD overlay.

fps_warning_enabled.description: Show a low-FPS warning when X-Plane frame rate drops below the configured threshold.

fps_warning_threshold.description: FPS threshold below which the low-FPS warning is shown.

accel_offset_x.description: Manual accelerometer X-axis offset in m/s^2.

accel_offset_y.description: Manual accelerometer Y-axis offset in m/s^2.

accel_offset_z.description: Manual accelerometer Z-axis offset in m/s^2.

mavlink_sensor_rate_hz.description: Target HIL_SENSOR rate. Actual rate is bounded by X-Plane callback rate.

autoPropBrakes.description: X-Plane engine indices that use the current configurable prop-brake behavior.

autoPropBrakeApplyThreshold.description: Apply prop brakes only after every configured brake motor command stays at or below this normalized command.

autoPropBrakeReleaseThreshold.description: Release all prop brakes immediately when any configured brake motor command reaches or exceeds this normalized command.

autoPropBrakeDwellSec.description: Continuous low-command dwell time before configured prop brakes may apply.

autoPropBrakeMinAirspeedMps.description: Optional true-airspeed gate for applying prop brakes. Zero disables the airspeed gate.

autoPropBrakeUseFailure.description: Experimental. Also use X-Plane engine-seizure failure while prop brakes are active.

channelN.description: PX4 actuator channel mapping to one or more X-Plane datarefs.
